business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

positives: Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors and subcontractors
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years
18 years with current management; 24 years in business
concerns: No formal safety program in place
One location (LOC-006) built in 1995 — older construction
EV charging stations on premises (emerging fire risk exposure)
Amenities including swimming pools/exercise rooms increase liability exposure
Two claims in the last three policy years (2024 and 2022)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Two claims over the past three years: 1 claim in 2024 (CNA), 0 claims in 2023 (Zurich), 1 claim in 2022 (AIG). No cancellations during the period.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas. Hours of operation Mon-Sat 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM. 145 full-time and 28 part-time employees.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: No formal safety program. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors and subcontractors. 24-hour doorperson/security on premises. All buildings fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. Plumbing last updated 2015, HVAC 2018, Electrical 2023.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history: 2024 CNA Financial - $414,601.77 premium, 1 claim; 2023 Zurich Insurance Group - $423,914.72 premium, 0 claims; 2022 American International Group - $447,842.42 premium, 1 claim. No cancellations across the three-year period.
